items.name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.

items.name_en: M12598 Monogram! Victor Wallet. This elegant Victor wallet is made of Monogram Eclipse canvas, perfect for coins, business cards, bills, and receipts. It features a snap closure with a bill pocket, five card slots for credit cards or transit cards, and a zippered coin pocket. The Victor wallet is compact and easily fits into a pocket.
items.name_cn:

11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width).

items.name_en: M12635 New Embossed! Victor Wallet. This compact Victor wallet is made from Monogram Shadow calfskin, embellished with delicate Monogram embossing patterns, exuding an air of 'understated luxury.' The interior offers practical organization with a zip pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flap features a snap closure and is embellished with the Louis Vuitton signature.
